title: rubus glabricarpus var. glabricarpus
intro: Rubus glabricarpus var. glabricarpus, also known as the Smooth Black Raspberry, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its high concentration of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus glabricarpus var. glabricarpus include potential anti-cancer properties, cardiovascular protection, and anti-aging effects. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
